summary: Vertical video, 26 seconds. A USCIS 'First 100 Days Accomplishments' promo: a graphics title card, then stock-style B-roll of a USCIS building, a naturalization oath being administered, and biometric fingerprinting, closing on a USCIS.gov card. A narrator voiceover recaps the agency 'enforcing immigration laws' and 'making America safe again' over the B-roll. There is no music track. On-screen and spoken text includes 'First 100 Days Accomplishments', 'U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services', 'USCIS.GOV', and 'make America safe again'.
notable_text: First 100 Days Accomplishments; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; USCIS.GOV; 'make America safe again'
